textPlain: One of the things about the Apple Store, is that folks want what it sells. Because of that, they put up with it.Personally, I find the Apple Store to be a pain in the ass. The online version makes me a clickaholic, and the IRL version is very confusing.Government sites are very different.I have no opinion on the new position. I don’t know the guy, and don’t use AirBnb. I just find that the insistence on making govt sites “like the Apple Store” to be weird.In a local mall, we have an Apple Store on one end, and a Microsoft Store on the other.Aesthetically, they are quite similar.But the Apple Store is always packed, and the Microsoft Store is always empty.
the disintegration of the federal government.
The swamp overfloweth. How do we cure the intractable corruption of Trump and his administration? Will the nation be worth a fragment of what it was once we do?

Sites like these that bury articles like this sure aren't helping. What our administration is doing is beyond just political, it's immoral, dangerous, and plain old fascism. This submission will be flagged within the hour.
